description: Content announcing late-night or extended operating hours, particularly relevant during Ramadan when establishments serve until early morning hours.
structural_recipe: Post announcement of extended hours with specific closing time (e.g., 3 AM). Include location reference (branch names). Add relevant emoji (prayer hands, heart). Close with branded hashtags. Optimal timing: evening/night. Tone: welcoming and accommodating.
why_it_works: Saudi consumers value convenience and flexibility, especially during Ramadan when social dining extends into late night hours. Extended hours signal business availability during peak engagement periods, reducing friction for spontaneous visits. Creates FOMO and demonstrates customer-centric operations.
transplantation_caveats: Ensure hours are accurate and compliant with local regulations
Ramadan-specific messaging may need seasonal adjustment for non-Ramadan periods
Late-night positioning may not resonate equally across all demographics
